message:
Add Doodlestein Punk theme for Ghostty

Cyberpunk-inspired color scheme with deep space black background
and electric neon accents. Includes README documentation with
palette table and installation instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

(neon teal) │ +│ Blue: #00aaff → #66ccff (cyber blue) │ +│ Magenta:#ff00ff → #ff66ff (hot purple) │ +└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ +``` + +**Quick install:** + +```bash +# Copy theme to Ghostty themes directory +mkdir -p ~/.config/ghostty/themes +cp doodlestein-punk-theme-for-ghostty ~/.config/ghostty/themes/ +``` + +**Usage:** Add to your Ghostty config (`~/.config/ghostty/config`): + +``` +theme = doodlestein-punk-theme-for-ghostty +``` + +
+Full palette + +| Index | Normal | Bright | Color Name | +|:------|:-------|:-------|:-----------| +| 0/8 | `#1a1f29` | `#3d4f5f` | Black/Gray | +| 1/9 | `#ff3366` | `#ff6b9d` | Red/Pink | +| 2/10 | `#39ffb4` | `#6bffcd` | Green/Teal | +| 3/11 | `#ffe566` | `#ffef99` | Yellow | +| 4/12 | `#00aaff` | `#66ccff` | Blue/Cyan | +| 5/13 | `#ff00ff` | `#ff66ff` | Magenta | +| 6/14 | `#00ffff` | `#66ffff` | Cyan | +| 7/15 | `#c7d5e0` | `#ffffff` | White | + +

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+# Doodlestein Punk Theme for Ghostty
+# Based on Cyberpunk Aurora - deep space with electric neon
+#
+# A vibrant cyberpunk-inspired color scheme featuring:
+# - Deep space black background (#0a0e14)
+# - Electric cyan foreground for maximum readability
+# - Hot magenta cursor that pops against the dark void
+# - Neon palette with electric pinks, teals, and purples
+#
+# Usage: Add `theme = doodlestein-punk-theme-for-ghostty` to your ghostty config
+
+# Core colors
+background = #0a0e14
+foreground = #b3f4ff
+cursor-color = #ff00ff
+cursor-text = #0a0e14
+selection-background = #1a1f29
+selection-foreground = #ffffff
+
+# Normal colors (0-7)
+palette = 0=#1a1f29
+palette = 1=#ff3366
+palette = 2=#39ffb4
+palette = 3=#ffe566
+palette = 4=#00aaff
+palette = 5=#ff00ff
+palette = 6=#00ffff
+palette = 7=#c7d5e0
+
+# Bright colors (8-15)
+palette = 8=#3d4f5f
+palette = 9=#ff6b9d
+palette = 10=#6bffcd
+palette = 11=#ffef99
+palette = 12=#66ccff
+palette = 13=#ff66ff
+palette = 14=#66ffff
+palette = 15=#ffffff
